mapper.update: UPDATE admin SET status = #{status} WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin SET role = #{role} WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin ( username, nickname, password, role, status, phone, email, remark, avatar, create_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{nickname}, #{password}, #{role}, 1, #{phone}, #{email}, #{remark}, #{avatar}, NOW() )
